top.title: Xi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin days after Trump
top.summary: Two presidential visits days apart is how Xi Jinping wants the world to see him: talking to everyone, tied to no-one.

top.title: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
top.summary: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.

top.title: Ebola vaccine could take nine months as death toll rise further, WHO warns
top.summary: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.

top.title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
top.summary: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

top.title: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
top.summary: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.

top.title: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
top.summary: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
